scripts.format: biome format --write .github apps fixtures libs tools biome.json nx.json package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format:check: biome format --error-on-warnings .github apps fixtures libs tools biome.json nx.json package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: biome lint --error-on-warnings .github apps fixtures libs tools biome.json nx.json package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint --write .github apps fixtures libs tools biome.json nx.json package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json
scripts.quality:biome: biome ci --error-on-warnings .github apps fixtures libs tools biome.json nx.json package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json
scripts.quality: bun run quality:biome && nx run-many -t typecheck test:unit --parallel=6
